For detecting the occlusal clearance of an onlay, visual inspection would likely suffice due to the ability to directly observe the fit and contact points without needing additional techniques like articulating paper or physical tests.
\boxed{B} Based on the context of dental procedures and specifically focusing on the occlusal clearance of an onlay, visual inspection allows dentists to directly evaluate the fit and ensure proper contact between the restoration and adjacent teeth.
